nl_query: For each question paper, show the paper title, the number of sections, the number of leaf questions, the number of attempt rules configured, the number of approved answer keys, and the number of boards using it, ordered by boards using it descending.
failed_sql: SELECT qp.title, COUNT(DISTINCT qs.id) AS num_sections, COUNT(DISTINCT q.id) AS num_leaf_questions, COUNT(DISTINCT ar.id) AS num_attempt_rules, COUNT(DISTINCT ak.id) AS num_approved_answer_keys, COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) AS num_boards USING qp FROM question_paper qp JOIN question_section qs ON qs.qp_id = qp.id JOIN question q ON q.section_id = qs.id JOIN attempt_rule ar ON ar.question_id = q.id JOIN answer_key ak ON ak.qp_id = qp.id JOIN board b ON b.qp_id = qp.id GROUP BY qp.title ORDER BY num_boards DESC;
error: Validation failed (aggregation): GROUP BY uses a descriptive column (like name, title, or code) without including the primary key (id). Names and titles may not be unique. Always include the entity's 'id' column in the GROUP BY clause alongside the descriptive column.
